title: Kejriwal moves fresh affidavit for recusal of Justice Swarana Sharma - ‘reasonable apprehension of conflict of interest’
description: Kejriwal that Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma’s son and daughter are empanelled as Central Government Counsel and that they are allotted work by the Solicitor General, who appeared for the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) before Justice Sharma.
